meta.notes: ABBREVIATED RUN — Stages 2+3 (assets+keyframes) skipped by reusing images from film_20260414_d6c9a0 (user request: 'use original keyframes and character images'). Stage 4.5 had NO lipsync — dialogue moved to sfx_hint so Kling generated voice natively; lipsync.py only applied background music mix. Voice quality (MiniMax TTS) rejected by user before reaching lipsync. Full standard run would add ~7-15min for assets/keyframes and ~10-20min for fal lipsync per dialogue shot. Project ID: film_20260415_335e2f. Timing reconstructed from file mtimes and _omni_jobs_state.json; LLM overhead estimated.

test_input.name: creative-brief-horror
test_input.description: Horror/thriller creative brief: Ji-yeon (22yo Korean exchange student) discovers ghost in abandoned university library. 12 shots, portrait 9:16, cold noir style.

task.name: short-film
task.purpose: Generate a complete ~60s horror short film from a 7-question creative brief: plan, keyframes, music, Kling video (5 batches), music mix
task.expected_output: Portrait 9:16 MP4 (~60s) with Kling-generated video, per-shot SFX audio, and background horror score, uploaded to CDN

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/nova3-agent-skills/short-film/

asset_acquisition.notes: No test input to download — input is a text creative brief only. Character/scene images were copied from existing project (not generated fresh).

steps.name: music_minimax
steps.notes: Stage 3.5: MiniMax music-2.5 instrumental. music.mp3 written at 01:01:49. Subagent spawned ~00:58:47 (est). Script: music.py. Output: background_music.mp3 (1219KB, ~76s track). Actual API call ~3min; full stage including subagent spawn ~3m02s.

steps.name: video_kling
steps.notes: Stage 4: Kling v3 omni multi-shot. 12 shots → 5 batches. submitted_at=2026-04-14T17:08:39Z. Batch files done at ~01:14:21 local (~5m42s render). Assembly at 01:15:12 (51s). Full stage from subagent spawn ~01:02:30 to assembly done 01:15:12 = 762s.

substeps.name: kling_submit
substeps.notes: 5 concurrent batch submissions via Kling API (est)

substeps.name: kling_poll_all_batches
substeps.notes: Polling loop every 30s until all 5 batches COMPLETED. 17:08:39Z to ~17:14:21Z = 342s

substeps.name: kling_download_assemble
substeps.notes: Download 5 batch MP4s, normalize PTS, ffmpeg concat. final_video_only.mp4 written at 01:15:12.

steps.name: lipsync_mix
steps.notes: Stage 4.5: NO lipsync (dialogue moved to sfx_hint, Kling handled voice natively). Only background music mix via ffmpeg. final.mp4 written at 01:15:51 = 39s after final_video_only.mp4. CDN upload included.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = skill_run_s (1184) + llm_overhead_s (231). Wall: 00:54:47 to 01:15:51 = 1264s. skill_run_s = sum of step durations (30+60+5+10+182+762+39=1088). Adjusted upward for inter-stage LLM overhead not yet separated.

delivery.notes: CDN upload is embedded in lipsync.py (Stage 4.5 execution step). Counted in execution.total_s, not here. output_url confirmed live.
